heading: Tonight
text: Snow showers over the higher terrain north and east of I-89, a dusting to an inch, 3 inches over 2000ft, then partial clearing, last over the northeast mountains. Lows from the mid teens to mid 20s north to south. Winds northwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light.

heading: Tuesday
text: A few early clouds northeast, otherwise sunshine, mixing with increasing afternoon clouds. Highs 30s to low 40s. Winds light, becoming southwest 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Becoming mostly cloudy north, with a few snow showers or flurries near and north of the Quebec border. Partly cloudy south. Lows 20 to 25 north, in the 20s to near 30 south. Winds west 10 to 15 mph, diminishing to light and variable.
